ops.title: capt-hook events multi-fired because CC dedupes hooks per-source; fixed by plugin-canonical registration in capt-hook 9.0.0 — settings.json carries no hook wiring anywhere
ops.body:
Claude Code's hook dedup key is `${pluginRoot ?? skillRoot ?? ""}\x00<command>`, so byte-identical `uvx capt-hook run <E>` commands registered from repo settings AND plugin hooks.json fire once PER SOURCE, concurrently (filed as anthropics/claude-code#76297; caused the cc-notes triplicate-notes incident).

**Resolution (2026-07-11, fully executed):** plugin-canonical registration.
- capt-hook **9.0.0** ships `captain_hook/hooks/hooks.json` registering all 12 Event members (SessionStart async, SessionEnd → `uvx capt-hook review run` async); `register-hooks` and the whole settings-merge machinery (generate_settings/merge_settings/classify_group/warn_settings_drift) are DELETED. A once-guard collapses residual double-fires except the deliberate decision-event exempt set {PreToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, PermissionRequest}.
- cc-context **0.12.0** and show **0.1.6** dropped their duplicate `capt-hook run` entries (SessionStart pack-attach kept).
- Fleet: `settings-base.json` in cc-skills carries **no hooks key** (guard test `plugins/repo-bootstrap/tests/test_guides_fragments.py` enforces it); all hand-managed repo settings swept; broadcast re-render stamped every fragment repo. The `packs.toml` `launcher` key is now inert for dispatch — a daemon/local launcher needs `${CAPT_HOOK_LAUNCHER:-uvx capt-hook}`-style indirection INSIDE plugin hooks.json (see [[macos-launch-security-exec-hang]] for why launchers matter).
- **captain-hook repo itself** sets `"captain-hook@captain-hook": false` in enabledPlugins — its `.venv` dev launcher is the sole dispatcher there ([[captain-hook-consume-packs-not-vendor]]).

**Why:** any tool that edits rendered `settings.json` directly self-reverts under cc-guides ([[cc-guides-generated-claude-md]]), and the JSON fragment merge is union-only (keys can never be removed by later fragments) — so hook wiring in settings was unfixable drift; the plugin is the only wiring source that updates atomically fleet-wide.

**How to apply:** never re-add capt-hook entries to any settings.json or guides fragment; new hook events ship by adding them to captain_hook/hooks/hooks.json + a capt-hook release; per-repo behavior is controlled solely by `.claude/hooks/packs.toml` (unsubscribed events no-op cleanly, ~one uvx exec of overhead).
